info.title: Work Flow API
info.description: This is the REST API for Work Flow

tags.name: Worker Job Workflows
tags.description: Endpoints for workers to manage their assigned workflows and steps

get.summary: Get all visit logs for a step

post.summary: Add a visit log to a step
Mark an initiated step as ongoing (INITIATED -> ONGOING)

get.summary: Get all comments for a step

post.summary: Add a comment to a step

get.summary: Get all attachments for a step

post.summary: Upload an attachment to a step

get.summary: Get all job workflows assigned to the current worker
Get specific job workflow details if assigned
Get all job workflow steps assigned to the current worker
Get discussion timeline (Comments & Attachments) for a step
